cover.subtitle:
사기와 유사,
천태와 조계.
cover.imagePrompt: 12th century Goryeo dynasty Buddhist temple library illustration. Foreground: a Buddhist monk-scholar (Uicheon or Jinul) in jade-green monk's robe, brushing characters onto rice paper at a low desk. Wooden Tripitaka Koreana printing blocks stacked beside him. Background: a celadon-colored Buddha statue and folding screen with mountain ink-painting. Soft golden incense smoke. Color: jade-green + warm amber + ink-black. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO READABLE CHARACTERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.title: 팔만대장경
items.desc: 대몽 항쟁 중 조성, 해인사 보존.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 삼국사기(1145·김부식·기전체·유교)와 삼국유사(1281·일연·단군 신화) 비교, 의천 천태종·지눌 조계종 매칭, 직지심체요절(1377)·팔만대장경 빈출.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book next to a small celadon-colored Buddhist pagoda silhouette. Jade-green + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
